chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 289 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أَخْذُ اَلشَّعْرِ مِنَ اَلْأَنْفِ يُحَسِّنُ اَلْوَجْهَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.289 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Removing hair from the nose enhances the appearance of the face."
